overview.short: Pulicat Lake Bird Sanctuary is a sanctuary for birds, 759 km2 (293 sq mi) in area, located in the Tirupati district of Andhra Pradesh and a protected area of the Thiruvallur Distri
overview.description: Pulicat Lake Bird Sanctuary is a sanctuary for birds, 759 km2 (293 sq mi) in area, located in the Tirupati district of Andhra Pradesh and a protected area of the Thiruvallur District of Tamil Nadu, India. Pulicat Lake is the second largest brackish-water eco-system in India after Chilka lake in Orissa. The sanctuary's international name is Pulicat Lake Wildlife Sanctuary (IBA Code: IN261, Criteria: A1, A4iii).

topPlaces.name: Pulicat Lake
topPlaces.description: Pulicat Lake is the second-largest brackish-water lagoon in India (after Chilika Lake), measuring 759 square kilometres (293 sq mi). A major part of the lagoon lies in the Tirupati district of Andhra Pradesh and rest with Thiruvallur district of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Irukkam Island
topPlaces.description: Irukkam is a lake island located in the middle of Pulicat Lake in Tada Mandal. Tirupati district ( Earlier SPSR Nellore District) of Andhra Pradesh.

items.note: Pulicat Lake is the second-largest brackish-water lagoon in India (after Chilika Lake), measuring 759 square kilometres (293 sq mi). A major part of the lagoon lies in the Tirupati district of Andhra Pradesh and rest with Thiruvallur district of Tamil Nadu.
Irukkam is a lake island located in the middle of Pulicat Lake in Tada Mandal. Tirupati district ( Earlier SPSR Nellore District) of Andhra Pradesh.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Pulicat Lake Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Pulicat Lake Bird Sanctuary is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Pulicat Lake Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (64 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (54 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Pulicat Lake Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Pulicat Lake Bird Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Pulicat Lake Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Pulicat Lake Bird Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Pulicat Lake Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Pulicat Lake, Irukkam Island.
